About the job
We are looking for a Client Partner to join our Advertising Sales team to manage our sales initiatives in the Philippines.


We want someone who loves our product and wakes up every morning happy to interact with our clients. You should be confident without ever being arrogant. You work hard, but know how to have fun. You should also exhibit a growth mindset that can rise above any challenges. Most importantly, your work will impact the way brands connect with the Spotify users!


This is a 12 month fixed term contract role based in Manila, Philippines, reporting to the Director of Sales based in Singapore.


What You'll Do
Focus on brand promotion, educating and inspiring our clients to use Spotify to enhance their business
Promote display advertising (video, mobile, programmatic), audio formats, and other ad space in order to support the advertising business by building, sustaining and growing a dedicated book of business with media agencies, creative agencies and clients directly
Work across multiple agency departments, i.e. programmatic, offline and digital, branded content and innovation teams, to assist with delivering successful and effective campaigns
Monitor and execute potential upsell opportunities
Partner with internal marketing, brand partnerships, and label relations teams to maximize earnings for Spotify and our partners
Conduct industry analysis and preparing relevant promotion and customers materials
Respond to RFPs and deliver extraordinary media proposals
Work with Account and Campaign Management team to monitor campaign performance, recommend optimisations, and support campaign delivery
Represent Spotify at promotional events
Diligent in managing all activity using salesforce.com on a regular basis and reporting your patch of business

Diploma or Bachelor’s Degree, preferably in Advertising, Business, Communications or Marketing

Knowledge of online and offline media planning and buying ecosystem including programmatic advertising and have the ability to be creative with audio and digital client solutions
You are obsessed with customer satisfaction with a proven track record to build internal and external relationships
Ability to deliver on multiple priorities with attention to detail despite tight deadlines
Analytical with a consistent record to think strategically and creatively
You have dexterity in creating reports and presentations using Excel, PowerPoint and Keynote; experience of Salesforce, DSM and DFP is a plus
A strong team player, smart, adapts well with change and has a positive attitude
You have strong negotiation skills and are able present effectively and close the deal
You are able to work in a fast-paced, exciting environment and across external and internal teams to deliver creative, fresh campaigns.
Proficiency in English & Tagalog (written & spoken)

Marketing Virtual Assistant
Are you someone who wants to empower and inspire others? Do you find yourself looking for opportunities for continuous learning and improvement? Are you driven by the satisfaction of completing tasks and achieving goals? Are you seeking a mission-driven culture that fosters your professional growth? If so, we would love to connect with you!

Who we’re looking for:
We are seeking a creative and tech-savvy Marketing Virtual Assistant/Customer Success Specialist to support Marketing and Development teams. This role is ideal for someone eager to learn, with a knack for content creation, research, and basic technical tasks. You will assist with a variety of projects, including marketing campaigns, content management, and quality control. You will also assist with customer inquiries via email and social media.
As a Marketing Virtual Assistant, you will:
Marketing and Development Support 
Assist in creating and editing content and graphics for blogs, newsletters, social media posts, and marketing materials;
Support quality control (QC) tasks for marketing and development to ensure basic accuracy and consistency; 
Schedule and post content on social media platforms and other channels;
Research on market trends, competitors, and audience preferences to support team initiatives;
Gather and organize marketing and sales data for reporting purposes, ensuring information is accurate and accessible;
Organize and maintain digital files, documents, and records;
Explore and implement emerging technologies, including AI tools, to optimize workflows.


Customer Service
Resolve customer requests via email and social media promptly and accurately, using Zendesk System, and Google/Meta services;
Assist with various administrative tasks, including Group Sales, working with affiliates, and completing projects across the organization.


You’ll thrive in this role if you are:
Creative and Tech-Savvy: Have interest or experience in design and video editing, with knowledge of tools like Canva, CRM platforms, and Google Services, and are interested in emerging tools and AI.
Detail-oriented: Excel in quality control and maintaining consistency across deliverables.
Customer Support Guru: Have experience in customer support or a similar role.
Action-Oriented: Have a strong ability to prioritize and juggle multiple priorities, proven at getting things done in a fast-paced dynamic & growing environment.
Communication champion: You can clearly explain complex information in written and verbal form to people who aren't experts.
Remote ready: You thrive in a remote environment and enjoy the flexibility and independence it offers.


Additional Information:
We are looking to hire someone willing to work 40 hours per week and is open to work evenings (US morning time).
It is a fully remote contract position, with Independent Contractors responsible for their taxes and benefits. 
Each applicant is required to complete a paid Trial Period before transitioning to this role.

Sales and Virtual Assistant

JOB DESCRIPTION:

We are seeking a motivated and organized Sales and Virtual Assistant to join our team. This role is focused on providing administrative support with a strong touch of sales interaction, offering an opportunity to apply your precision in administration and your ability to interact with members positively and professionally. This position requires someone with a strong administrative and sales background, with less emphasis on marketing.



Proficiency in a foreign language other than English is a plus, though not required. However, we do prefer someone who is confident in communicating with individuals who speak different primary languages. The ideal candidate should be outgoing and proactive in their approach, constantly seeking ways to enhance value.



JOB ROLES & RESPONSIBILITIES:



MAIN:

Personal assistant for 2
NOTE: Administrative tasks or any assistance needed, with the workload corresponding to the designated working hours.
Assist data management
Assist advisory boards around the world
Assist chapters around the world with help
Assist Introductions process
Assist website
Assist marketing


OTHERS:

-Working with the CEO to manage a pipeline of new chapters.

-Maintaining organization and ensuring the new chapters remain organized.

-Providing support to chapters by issuing meeting notices as needed.

-Offering marketing support to chapters through templated materials on a regular basis.

-Managing communities through WhatsApp, including facilitation when necessary.

-Work effectively with a diverse range of people from around the world.

-Proactively improving processes to streamline growth and workflow.

-Membership Manager / prospects + renewals + engagement



Manage member sales pipeline - member engagement, mentorship, support, renewals
Onboard new members, update renewals (Accrisoft, emails, Google sheets)
Pull renewals ahead and reach out to obtain renewal (From transactions to Invoices / Dues module and emails)
Regular member engagement, especially members follow ups after 2-3 months
 -->Planning call with members and EDs / HQ, etc…



Manage prospects sales pipeline - prospect reach outs, appointment setting, onboard
Work with Client to decide how to be involved on this side, too 
Answer requests through the “Contact Us” section
Support ED/GAs sales trainings and prospecting and work to simplify outreach


Introductions support with Client
Enter intros into sheet
Later - help improve this process as part of member engagement
 --->Start with LoE and LoO introductions



JOB REQUIREMENTS:



Experience

Strong administrative and sales background, less emphasis on marketing experience.


Precision in Administration

Highly organized, detail-oriented, and adept at managing numbers, names, and data.


Member Interaction: 

Ability to interact with members in a positive, professional, and diligent manner, ensuring excellent service.
Ability to interact with leaders from different countries and cultures. Demonstrating the ability to work effectively with a diverse range of people from around the world.


Sales Skills

Basic selling experience required, comfortable with light, consultative sales rather than hard selling.


Outgoing and proactive approach to discovering better ways to add value.



Proficiency in a foreign language other than English is a plus, but not required.



ADDITIONAL REQUIREMENTS: 



DIVERSE OR INTERNATIONAL SOCIAL EXPOSURE/EXPERIENCE:

Diverse Social Experience: Demonstrated experience socializing with individuals from various cultural backgrounds, ethnicities, and nationalities. This could include experiences such as living, working, or studying in diverse communities or traveling extensively.


International Experience: Exposure to international environments, whether through travel, study abroad programs, work assignments, or other avenues. Candidates with proficiency in multiple languages or a strong interest in foreign cultures and affairs.
